items.description:

💍 🎀 Visit our group for weekly item drops & drop your suggestions! 
https://www.roblox.com/ja/communities/409625491/Dresscraft#!/about

❤️ Other Colors
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?taxonomy=1MvRtnnsy2FJWmkErSBxBa&CreatorName=Dresscraft&salesTypeFilter=1


💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sporty, playful shoes with soft fur textures and charming fox ears! These orange-and-white sneakers blend cozy woodland vibes with energetic streetwear style.
Cute fox-ear design with fluffy details 🦊
PBR materials for realistic shine and fur texture
Perfect for cozy, animal, or casual streetwear avatars
Stylish balance of fun and comfort
🔍 Keywords: fox, shoes, sneakers, furry, animal, cute, cozy, PBR, streetwear, Roblox
Stay swift, stay clever —
the Foxy Sneakers turn every step into an adventure 🍂✨
